reason: Verify new models use UUIDMixin/TimestampMixin, cascade deletes correct, migration follows sequential ID convention
Verify error handling for new endpoints (image upload limits, invalid references, conversation ownership)
Code quality checks: no forbidden patterns, proper async usage, no accidental sync in async context
Verify ConversationSidebar uses ScrollArea fix, proper component structure, semantic CSS vars for chat UI
Verify no server data in Zustand, conversation state in React Query, temporary UI state not persisted
Verify query key factory used, mutations invalidate correctly, no stale data after conversation mutations
Frontend code quality: no hardcoded colors, proper dark mode, no CSS modules
Verify TypeScript types match API schemas, no loose types on new interfaces
Verify data flow consistency: conversation model↔schema↔API↔TypeScript, image upload→serve→vision message format
Verify reuse of extract_content_for_summary, SSE pattern, chat message building for multi-article references
